bot.command.branch: Create and switch to a Git branch
bot.command.provider: Choose the provider for new sessions
bot.command.switch: List sessions or switch to one
bot.error.command_failed: ⚠️ Command failed. Check the server log for details.
common.agent_already_running: ⏳ An agent is already running on project '{project_folder}'. Please wait for it to finish.
common.current_project_not_git: ⚠️ Current project is not a git repository.
common.no_active_session:
No active session.
Please run /project and /new first.
common.no_project_selected:
No project selected.
Please run /project <project_folder> first.
common.project_busy:
An agent is currently running on project '{project_folder}'.
Only /current and /abort are supported until it finishes.
common.project_folder_missing: ⚠️ Project folder no longer exists for this session: {project_folder}
git.branch_unknown: ⚠️ Could not determine the branch for the current session.
git.push_cancelled_checkout_failed: Push cancelled. Failed to switch to `{branch_name}` first.
message.photo_only_codex: Photo attachments are currently supported only for codex sessions.
message.question_queued: Question queued as Q{question_number}. It will run after the current agent task finishes.
message.voice_speech_to_text_disabled:
Voice messages are not enabled.
Set ENABLE_OPENAI_WHISPER_SPEECH_TO_TEXT=true and install the local Whisper prerequisites first.
message.unsupported_message_type:
Unsupported message type.
This bot currently accepts text messages, photos, voice messages, and audio files.
queue.continue_prompt: The previous run was aborted. Do you want to continue processing the pending queued questions?
queue.continuing: Continuing with the pending queued questions.
queue.group_guidance_1: Group questions only when they are closely related and each question is reasonably short.
queue.group_guidance_2: Combining too many questions can make the prompt too large or reduce the agent's focus.
queue.no_batch_pending: No queued batch is waiting for a decision.
queue.processing_grouped: Processing the queued questions as one batch.
queue.processing_single: Processing the queued questions one by one.
runtime.active_run_stall:
The current agent run appears stuck.
The local agent process is still running but has not produced output.
On macOS, this might be because a hidden permission dialog is waiting for confirmation on the machine running the bot.
runtime.photo_too_large: Photo is too large. The maximum supported size is 5 MB.
runtime.replacement_session_stall:
Replacement session creation appears stuck.
The local agent process is still running but has not produced output.
On macOS, this might be because a hidden permission dialog is waiting for confirmation on the machine running the bot.
runtime.sensitive_diff_omitted:
{path}
This file contains sensitive content and was omitted.
runtime.voice_audio_too_large: Audio is too large for local speech-to-text. The maximum supported size is {max_size_mb} MB.
runtime.voice_model_initial_download_not: The selected Whisper model may still be downloading on first use. Larger models such as turbo are more likely to hit this timeout.
status.abort_signal_sent: Abort signal sent for the current project run.
status.no_running_agent: No running agent process was found for the current project.
switch.current_project_filter: Current project filter for native sessions: {project_folder}
switch.current_project_filter_none: Current project filter for native sessions: (none)
switch.native_import_note: Selecting a native CLI session imports it into state.json and switches the bot to it.
switch.session_not_found:
⚠️ Session not found.
Run /switch to list available sessions.
bootstrap.env_created_locale_line: Created {env_path}. APP_LOCALE was initialized to {app_locale} based on this system language.
bootstrap.env_created_change_line: To use another language later, edit APP_LOCALE in {env_path}.
project.branch_switch_requires_source: Switching branch to {new_branch} requires choosing a source first.
project.branch_create_from_source: Creating a new branch from the following branch source: {new_branch}
project.branch_source_missing:
Branch source not found for project '{project_folder}'.
Missing local/{source_branch} and origin/{source_branch}.
project.invalid_project_folder: Invalid project folder. Folder name only is allowed.
project.path_not_directory: Project path exists but is not a directory: {folder}
project.start_new_session_for_project_ht: Start a new session with /new if you want to work in this newly selected project.
project.branch_selection_required: Branch selection is required before creating or continuing a session in this project.
project.branch_usage_html: Use /branch <new_branch> or /branch <origin_branch> <new_branch> if you want a dedicated work branch.
project.default_branch_behavior_html: If <origin_branch> is not specified, the bot uses the default branch: {branch_name}.
project.current_branch_behavior_html: If you do not set one, the bot will work on the current branch: {branch_name}
project.trust_prompt_html:
Do you trust this project?
Project: {project_folder}
project.default_branch_unknown: Could not determine the default branch for this repository.
project.project_folder_missing_retry:
Project folder does not exist: {project_folder}
Run /project {project_folder} again.
branch_resolution.create_from_instead_of: Do you want to create branch {new_branch} from one of these branches instead of origin/{source_branch}?
branch_resolution.discrepancy_detected: Branch discrepancy detected before running the active session.
branch_resolution.no_pending_decision: No pending branch decision was found.
branch_resolution.no_pending_discrepancy: No pending branch discrepancy was found.
branch_resolution.stored_branch_unavaila:
Stored branch is no longer available: {branch_name}
No fallback source branch is available.
Stored branch is no longer available.
branch_resolution.create_branch_from_cho: Do you want to create branch {branch_name} from one of these branches?
branch_resolution.choose_restore_method: Choose how to restore the stored branch.
lifecycle.provider_selection_required: Provider selection is required before creating or continuing a session.
lifecycle.no_project_selected_example:
No project selected.
Please run /project <project_folder> first.
Example: /project backend
lifecycle.session_name_exists:
Session name already exists: {session_name}
Please use a different session name.
provider.cli_not_found:
{provider_label} CLI not found: {bin_name}
Run /provider to choose an available provider or update the bot config.
provider.current_provider_prompt:
Current provider: {provider}
Choose the provider for new sessions.
provider.cli_not_found_install_first:
{provider_label} CLI not found: {bin_name}
Update the bot config or install that CLI first.
git.commit_disabled:
/commit is disabled.
Set ENABLE_COMMIT_COMMAND=true in the bot environment to enable it.
git.no_valid_commit_commands: No valid git commit commands were found.
git.project_not_trusted_for_mutation: This project is not trusted for mutating git operations. Use a project created by /project or mark it trusted first.
git.unsafe_path_arguments: Unsafe path arguments are not allowed. Only files inside the current project may be used.
cli.created_env_if_missing: Created {env_path} if it did not already exist.
runtime.compact_summary_missing: The provider did not return a usable compact handoff summary.
